generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.com/DTDFVocab#"

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmission
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraTransmission
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle speed and state data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTransmission
]

instance LiDARPointCloudTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected path"
]

instance HumanReadableReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance DriverFeedbackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for driver feedback and development troubleshooting"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection for ACC system"
]

instance SafeFollowingDistanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC control decisions for maintaining safe following distance"
]

instance RemoteACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote disable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking activation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight, HumanReadableReportInsight, DriverFeedbackInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing for lead vehicle detection and speed calculation",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SafeFollowingDistanceDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCEnableAction, RemoteACCDisableAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and development",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for implementation of Kalman filter and ACC control model",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance ROS2 node implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase
]

instance DepthCameraDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth and visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3_8, SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and state data from Vedder Electronic Speed Controller",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3_8
]

    base:desc "ISO 15622-based ACC control model for safe following distance",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3_8
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator controlled via ROS2 nodes for speed commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlled via ROS2 nodes for steering signals"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed) via ROS2 nodes in the Actuation FE, converting commands to motor voltage and steering servo signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronized clocks with 100 ms accuracy for event ordering and coordination; end-to-end latency of ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity for real-time ACC operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Four entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross-System) communicating via ROS2 within vehicle and Wi-Fi between entities; Data Translation FE handles serialization and protocol conversion for all data streams."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates during the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, supporting real-time optimization and health monitoring of the vehicle during active driving operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync accuracy of 100 ms for real-time operation; validation through physical vehicle testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-vehicle communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized using OPC Unified Architecture (IEC 62541) or custom protocol via Data Translation FE."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and NX. Data Storage is hosted on an external device. Digital Twin Entity is hosted externally (cloud or separate server) to offload ACC computation from the vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization (100 ms accuracy) for real-time operations; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in the document."
]
